title: MethodologyAtom
description: A single methodology / knowledge atom card (kind='methodology'). For kind='experience' see experience-atom.schema.json (subKind='crystallized') and experience-fragment.schema.json (subKind='fragment'); for kind='skill-inventory' see skill-inventory-item.schema.json; for kind='profile' (V2.x bootstrap-skill, singleton id=atom_profile_main) see profile-atom.schema.json. Introduced in V1.5: the 'kind' discriminator field. V2.x adds the 'profile' kind via the 2026-04-bootstrap-skill change.

kind.description: V1.5 discriminator. Must be 'methodology' for this schema. V1 atoms get this backfilled by scripts/migrate-v1-to-v1.5.mjs.

cellId.description: Cell/category/node identifier. Integer for matrix layouts, string for list/tree.

role.description: V2.0 · role dimension for unified skeleton grouping

lastAccessedAt.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · ISO 8601 timestamp passively updated by atomsyn-cli when read/find hits this atom (throttled, only persisted to disk if last update was > 1h ago). Feeds confidence_decay calculation. Optional; absent fallbacks to createdAt.

supersededBy.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · Single atom id that supersedes this one. When set, atom is read-only and read/find default-hides it (filter out in index).

supersedes.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · Atom ids this atom supersedes (single-direction linked list, multiple ids supported when merging multiple atoms into one).

archivedAt.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · ISO 8601 soft-delete timestamp. read/find default does not return; can be unset via atomsyn-cli archive --restore.

archivedReason.description: V2.x cognitive-evolution · Optional user-provided rationale captured when archiving.

aiInvokeCount.description: V2.0 · incremented by atomsyn-cli read (agent consumption)

humanViewCount.description: V2.0 · incremented when user opens atom in GUI

invokedByAgent.description: V1.5 · how many times each agent invoked this atom via atomsyn-read. Key = agent name, value = count.

userDemoted.description: V1.5 · T-6.2 calibration action. True means user down-weighted this atom in retrieval ranking.

locked.description: V1.5 · T-6.2 calibration action. True means agent write operations cannot mutate this atom.
